execution_focus.priority: Secure SEC Letter of No Objection (LoNO) / Regulatory Clearance
execution_focus.outcome: VASP LONO issued — unblocks DLM, MOFI, Paga etc
MoU alignment for National Digital Commodity Savings
Revenue from Academy, MoMo, Agri, Partnerships

execution_focus.priority: Activate gold redemption — Through regulated Gold suppliers in-country
execution_focus.outcome: Full GIFT platform live; scale B2B network

blockers: Pipeline value assumes 3% conversion of top 3 partners' users and average monthly buy of $10 in GIFT

Nigeria.summary: Primary market. 15 B2B partners. $7.55M projected turnover. SEC ARIP sandbox application active. Gold acquisition chain in progress.

B2G.name: SEC Nigeria
B2G.summary: ARIP sandbox application. Regulatory Business Plan formally submitted. Awaiting SEC review and determination on registration category.

milestones.task: Introduced regulatory@utribe.one to SEC as official sandbox email
milestones.blockers: None

milestones.task: Planner/Notifications: follow-ups and deadline reminders for SEC submissions & fee
milestones.blockers: Items flagged as late; acceptance gated on payment & uploads

milestones.task: ARIP assessment fee funding request to Treasury (USDC on Polygon)
milestones.blockers: Treasury transfer pending → blocks SEC acceptance/LONO; cascading to DLM, MOFI, Osun, BoA, MTN/Monieworx

milestones.task: Whitepaper submission to SEC (RI/ARIP) and re-upload of all documents up to Stage 06
milestones.blockers: Portal intermittently returned 'application not found'

milestones.task: ARIP portal status clarification + fee discrepancy raised to SEC
milestones.blockers: Conflicting prompts for whitepaper fee; retention issues on portal

milestones.task: Development of Business Plan for SEC Submission, Whitepaper
milestones.blockers: Team review done

milestones.task: Regulatory Business Plan formally submitted to SEC Nigeria
milestones.blockers: Awaiting SEC feedback; next stage begins when Commission responds

flagship_programmes.name: NITDA 774 LGAs — National Digital Commodity Savings
flagship_programmes.blueprint: Embed GIFT gold savings education and wallet onboarding into NITDA's 774-LGA DL4All infrastructure. Positioning Ubuntu Tribe as Nigeria's premier national digital commodity savings enabler.

rollout_phases.title: EDUCATE
rollout_phases.description: Integrate Ubuntu Academy curriculum into the DL4All program. Train local instructors.

rollout_phases.title: AUTHORITY
rollout_phases.description: Establish Government co-branding and launch media campaigns to build trust.

rollout_phases.title: CHAMPIONS
rollout_phases.description: Onboard 300 pilot users (community leaders, NYSC) to test and advocate the platform.

rollout_phases.title: SCALE
rollout_phases.description: Target 100 wallets per LGA. Sign formal MoU and begin nationwide expansion.
